heading: Payment of costs of operation and maintenance of infrastructure at Nevada National Security Site
label: 6361 Payment of costs of operation and maintenance of infrastructure at Nevada National Security Site
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law and effective as of , the costs associated with operating and maintaining the infrastructure at the Nevada National Security Site, Nevada, with respect to any activities initiated at the site after that date by the Department of Defense pursuant to a work-for-others agreement may be paid for from funds authorized to be appropriated to the Department of Energy for activities at the Nevada National Security Site.September 30, 1996
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2822 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
